nasb.text: He set the rods which he had peeled in front of the flocks in the gutters, even in the watering troughs, where the flocks came to drink; and they mated when they came to drink.

esv.text: He set the sticks that he had peeled in front of the flocks in the troughs, that is, the watering places, where the flocks came to drink. And since they bred when they came to drink,

cnv.text: 然後把剝了皮的枝子插在水溝和水槽裡，枝子正對著來喝水的羊群。羊群來喝水的時候，就彼此交配。

ccb.text: 然后把这些嫩枝插在羊喝水的水槽和水沟里。羊群来喝水时互相交配。

csbs.text: 然后他把剥好的枝子插在羊群喝水的水沟和水槽里，对着羊群。羊来喝水的时候，彼此交配。
